events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: landed on wrong terminal. Work roughed in, loop checks & wiring I&C. Defect: landed on wrong terminal. This is non-compliant, could cause incorrect signal, short, equipment damage, process hazard. Decision must be fail because dangerous or non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. Value not asked. Sound etc default maybe 0/empty. Findings: conductor landed on wrong terminal per loop drawings/ISA 5.1. Actions: remove, verify wire tag, re-land per loop drawing, retorque, continuity/loop check, update QC. Rationale. References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need valid JSON only.

{

  "findings": [
    "Field wire/conductor landed on wrong terminal",
    "Termination does not match loop drawing / ISA 5.1 tagging",
    "Risk of incorrect signal, short circuit, or energizing wrong device"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize and lock out affected circuit before correction",
    "Remove wire from incorrect terminal",
    "Verify wire tag against loop drawing and panel termination schedule",
    "Re-land conductor on correct terminal per loop drawing",
    "Torque terminal to specification and inspect for stray strands/damage",
    "Perform point-to-point continuity and loop check",
    "Update red-line/as-built and QC documentation"
  ],
  "rationale": "A conductor landed on the wrong terminal is a non-compliant installation defect that invalidates the loop check and creates a high risk of incorrect control action or equipment damage. The installation is roughed in but cannot progress to test/inspect until the termination is corrected and verified against the loop drawing.",
  "references": [
    "loop drawings",
    "ISA 5.1"
  ]
}
